chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Acquittal Appeal No.S-09 of 2023 (Shahzado Tanwari Shah Vs. The State & others) Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For Orders on MA No. 1136/2023. (U/A) 2. For Orders on office objection. 3. For Orders on MA No. 1137/2023. (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case. 01-03-2023. Mr. Asadullah Arbani, advocate for appellant..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Deferred. 4. The facts in brief for disposal of instant Acquittal Appeal are that a Direct Complaint was filed by the appellant for prosecution of the private respondents for allegedly committing offence punishable u/s 392 and 506/2 PPC, it was brought on record; the private respondents were directed to face the trial and on conclusion of trial they were acquitted by learned Judicial Magistrate, Daharki, vide judgment dated 31-12-2022, which is impugned by the appellant before this Court by way of instant Crl. Acquittal Appeal, without seeking leave to appeal which is necessary in terms of sub-section to section 417 Cr.P.C. Even otherwise, no illegality, mis/non reading of evidence is pointed, which may justify this Court to make interference with the impugned judgment, consequently, the instant Crl. Acquittal Appeal being misconceived is dismissed in limini. JUDGE Nasim /PA
